name: Ol Doinyo Lengai
eruptionHistory: The world's only active volcano that erupts natrocarbonatite lava. Major explosive eruption in 2007-2008 changed the summit profile.
description: Ol Doinyo Lengai is unique as the only active volcano erupting natrocarbonatite lava — carbonatite lava that is much cooler (500°C) and more fluid than silicate lavas.
